# Lehman Landscape

> Landscaper serving Saratoga, Springs and surrounding areas. Lehman Landscape provides quality landscaper services in Saratoga, Springs. Licensed, insured, and locally trusted.

## Key Facts
- Business: Lehman Landscape
- Category: Landscaper
- Location: Serving Saratoga, Springs, Saratoga, Springs
- Phone: (518) 893-1508
- Email: contact@lehman-landscape.com
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 127 reviews
- Years in business: 1
- Jobs completed: 50

## Services
- [Lawn Care](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/landscaper/lehman-landscape//services/lawn-care/): Regular mowing, edging, fertilizing, and lawn health programs.
- [Garden Design](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/landscaper/lehman-landscape//services/garden-design/): Custom garden design, planting, and seasonal flower installations.
- [Tree Service](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/landscaper/lehman-landscape//services/tree-service/): Tree trimming, pruning, removal, and health assessments.
- [Hardscaping](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/landscaper/lehman-landscape//services/hardscaping/): Patios, walkways, retaining walls, and outdoor living spaces.
- [Irrigation](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/landscaper/lehman-landscape//services/irrigation/): Sprinkler system installation, repair, and seasonal tune-ups.
- [Seasonal Cleanup](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/landscaper/lehman-landscape//services/seasonal/): Spring and fall property cleanup, leaf removal, and bed mulching.

## Frequently Asked Questions
- **Do you offer free estimates?** Yes, we provide free, no-obligation estimates for all landscaper services.
- **Are you licensed and insured?** Absolutely. We are fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your protection.
- **What areas do you serve?** We serve Saratoga, Springs and surrounding communities.
- **How quickly can you respond?** We offer same-day and 24/7 emergency service for urgent issues.
- **Do you guarantee your work?** Yes, we stand behind every job with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
